alphafold.description: AlphaFold structure prediction database - 200M+ protein structures

uniprot.description: UniProt protein database - 250M+ sequences, 25 specialized tools

dlm_literature.description: DLM Literature & Biological Context - IN-PROCESS (zero latency), 9 tools: entity extraction, multi-source literature search, relation extraction, NeSy document encoding, entity mapping, LMP context

pubmed.description: PubMed biomedical literature - 35M+ articles, full-text access

chembl.description: ChEMBL drug discovery database - 2.4M compounds, 16M bioactivity measurements, 27 tools

opentargets.description: OpenTargets - 6 tools for gene-drug-disease associations, 60K+ targets, 25K+ diseases

pubchem.description: PubChem chemical database - 110M+ compounds, safety/toxicity data, 30 tools

reactome.description: Reactome - 8 tools for pathway curation, reaction networks, protein interactions

ensembl.description: Ensembl - 25 tools for genome annotation, cross-species genomics, variant analysis

geneontology.description: Gene Ontology - 4 tools for functional annotation, GO term search, ontology navigation

proteinatlas.description: Protein Atlas - 14 tools for tissue expression, subcellular localization, pathology data

bioontology.description: BioOntology - 10 tools for ontology search, text annotation, semantic analysis

pdb.description: Protein Data Bank - 200K+ 3D structures, validation metrics, 5 tools + 6 resources

biorxiv.description: bioRxiv preprint server - biology preprints, latest research, 3 tools

semantic_scholar.description: Semantic Scholar - 12 tools for AI-powered literature discovery, citations, author profiles

string_db.description: STRING-DB - 6 tools for protein interaction networks, functional enrichment

kegg.description: KEGG - 33 tools for pathway analysis, gene/compound research, drug interactions
